code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let at_end = i == n
  mut is_space = true
  if not at_end
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      is_space = is_ws(b)
    when None
      is_space = true
    end
  end
  if is_space
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("positive=#{count}")
